name: python3-cups
title: python3-cups
description:
Python3 bindings for CUPS
A module of python3 bindings for using the CUPS 2+ API in
python3 programs.
.
CUPS needs to be installed and running for python3-cups to work
correctly.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cups because Python3 bindings for CUPS.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cups as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cups with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cups --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
